log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Goliath — Winged Striker (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Goliath — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Goliath — Winged Striker HP: 56/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Goliath — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Goliath — Winged Striker HP: 27/67
--- Goliath — Winged Striker --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 135/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Goliath — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 28 damage. Goliath — Winged Striker HP: -1/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Goliath — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
